scenarios.title: Define the governed swarm plan from current runtime contracts
scenarios.summary: ProductOS can now express the broader swarm as one internal governed plan with routes, review triggers, and anti-loop controls instead of prompt-only intent.

scenarios.title: Hold the external claim boundary while expanding internal swarm coverage
scenarios.summary: The broader swarm is visible and actionable internally, but the release boundary still keeps autonomous PM replacement claims out of the external promise set.

truthfulness_summary: ProductOS now has a governed internal swarm plan and runtime surfacing for broader autonomous PM work, but the capability remains explicitly internal-only until repeated outcome proof exists.

dimension_scores.rationale: The PM can supervise one bounded swarm mission without reconstructing the route plan or reviewer stack from scratch.
The swarm plan makes route ownership, review triggers, and exit conditions explicit enough to be reviewable and reusable.
Anti-loop controls, PM gates, and Ralph stage requirements are now encoded before broader execution begins.
The plan expands autonomous coverage while keeping review-gated behavior and blocked-state handling explicit.
The swarm now has a repo-native plan artifact that can be scored, re-run, and hardened through the same improve phase on future iterations.

reviewer_verdict.summary: The swarm plan is bounded, legible, and keeps PM approval and contradiction escalation explicit.

tester_verdict.summary: The new swarm artifact validates structurally and now lives in the same runtime surface as the rest of the next-version bundle.

manual_verdict.summary: Keep the broader swarm in internal use while one bounded mission proves outcome movement before any release-scope change.

blocked_by: External autonomous PM replacement and open-ended swarm claims remain deferred until repeated real runs prove outcome movement.

feedback_items.summary: Run one bounded internal swarm mission and score its actual outcome movement before broadening the claim set.
feedback_items.recommended_action: Route the next broader autonomous PM slice through the governed swarm plan, capture outcome review evidence, and rescore readiness.

next_action: Keep the swarm internal, run one bounded mission through outcome review, and rescore only after repeatable evidence exists.
